task_description: Wave 2: Wire remaining 4 apps (QuantTube, QuantMax, QuantNeon, QuantEdits) with API proxy routes, wire real-time features (LiveKit for QuantMeet, Yjs for QuantDocs), add universal Command Palette + Ask Quant AI across all apps, and apply UI/UX excellence pass with loading/empty/error states and spring animations.

verification.summary: All 24 typecheck tasks pass (8 apps). All 22 test tasks pass (total ~1000+ tests across 7 packages). Tests cover backend services, UI components, and hooks. No test regressions.

issues_fixed: Issue 1: Proxy streaming/binary response handling added to all 6 proxy.ts files with Content-Type detection and stream option
Issue 2: WebSocket reconnection with exponential backoff (1s-30s) added to useLiveKit
Issue 3: ICE restart on peer connection failure via oniceconnectionstatechange handler
Issue 4: Speaking detection interval pauses when audio is muted and resumes when unmuted
review_fixes.verification: typecheck pass (21 tasks), tests pass (21 tasks, 637 tests across 6 apps)
